name: safe_delete_file
description: Deletes a file by name without requiring the exact path. Lists the directory first, fuzzy-matches the filename, then deletes the exact match. Use this instead of delete_file when given a human name like 'Hello World'.

output.message: {{if .delete.ok}}Deleted {{.find.stdout}}{{else if .find.stdout}}Found file but deletion failed{{else}}No file named '{{.input.name}}' was found{{end}}

name.description: The filename to delete, without path

directory.description: Full path to directory, e.g. ~/Desktop or ~/Documents. Defaults to ~/Desktop if omitted.
